name: Cardiac CT Coronary Angiography
description: CT coronary angiography for evaluation of coronary artery stenosis

findings.technique: CT coronary angiography was performed with ECG-gating and intravenous contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Left Main
sections.content: Left main coronary artery [is patent / no stenosis / no plaque].

sections.name: LAD
sections.content: Left anterior descending artery [is patent / no significant stenosis]. No calcified or non-calcified plaque.

sections.name: LCx
sections.content: Left circumflex artery [is patent / no significant stenosis].

sections.name: RCA
sections.content: Right coronary artery [is patent / no significant stenosis].

impression:
1. No coronary artery stenosis.
2. Normal CT coronary angiogram.
